title: M365 Specialist and Regulated Persona Activation v1
notes: 16 P2D personas activated across 6 departments, 122 total new actions
5 personas blocked: instagram-curator, tiktok-strategist, reddit-community-builder, twitter-engager, app-store-optimizer (require non-M365 external APIs)
High-risk personas (finance-tracker, legal-compliance-checker) have explicit approval rules
